launchMessage: Welcome to ZobiView! Explore our collection of web apps and tools. Click 'OK' to start your journey.

theme.contentDescription: ZobiView is a versatile application that provides access to a curated collection of web-based tools and information portals. It's designed for users who need quick access to multiple online resources without juggling numerous browser tabs. The content ranges from productivity utilities to informational sites, presented in an easy-to-navigate grid.

webViews.title: Unit Converter
webViews.descriptiveText: This Unit Converter helps you convert various units of measurement. Select the category, enter the value, and choose your units. For full access, please watch a short ad.

webViews.title: Tech News
webViews.htmlContent:
Latest in Tech

Explore the newest advancements and stories in the world of technology. This section is updated frequently with curated content.

webViews.title: Weather Forecast
webViews.descriptiveText: Get the latest weather updates for your location. This tool provides current conditions and forecasts.

webViews.title: Quick Note
webViews.htmlContent: Simple Notepad
webViews.descriptiveText: A simple online notepad for your quick thoughts and reminders. To save more than 3 notes, please consider watching an ad.

webViews.title: Google Search
webViews.descriptiveText: Access the Google search engine directly. This requires watching a short ad first.

webViews.title: Image Enhancer (aftabai.xyz)
webViews.descriptiveText: Enhance your images using this tool from aftabai.xyz. Allows image uploads.

dailyMessages: Welcome back to ZobiView! Hope you have a productive day.
Did you know? You can customize the WebViews in config.json!
Have a great day exploring the web!
New features are always being added. Stay tuned!
Don't forget to share ZobiView with your friends if you find it useful!
